description: Multiple incidents observed with the flight-sim kiosk touchscreen becoming unresponsive. Opening a problem record to track underlying hardware fault and determine if a replacement unit is needed.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Flight-sim kiosk touchscreen recurring faults

description: Recurring Wi-Fi connectivity failures on audio guide tablets in the docent room. Opening a problem record to identify whether the issue is router firmware, DHCP exhaustion, or device configuration.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Audio guide tablet Wi-Fi recurring disconnects

description: Gift shop POS receipt printing has failed across two successive software updates. Opening a problem record to engage the POS vendor and prevent recurrence.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Gift shop POS receipt printing failures

description: Entrance digital signage has lost connection to the content server on multiple occasions. Opening a problem record to review network path and content management server stability.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Entrance digital signage content server connection loss

description: Nightly membership export to the email marketing tool has failed repeatedly, blocking renewal reminders. Opening a problem record to review the export job, credentials, and field mapping.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Membership export job nightly failures

description: Lobby donation kiosk card reader has rejected payments across multiple weekends. Opening a problem record to determine whether the issue is the reader hardware, firmware, or the payment gateway connection.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Donation kiosk card reader rejecting payments

description: Cafe guest Wi-Fi has dropped on a recurring fifteen-minute interval since the weekend outage. Opening a problem record to inspect access point channel interference and controller configuration.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Cafe guest Wi-Fi recurring drops

description: Cockpit-procedures trainer repeatedly fails to load the 737 panel module on startup. Opening a problem record to review the module install and graphics driver compatibility with the vendor.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Cockpit trainer 737 module load failures

description: Online ticketing checkout has errored on timed-entry passes with phantom declines. Opening a problem record to engage the ticketing vendor and prevent revenue loss on advance sales.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Online ticketing checkout phantom declines

description: Two jet-age gallery lighting zones repeatedly fail to power on from the control panel. Opening a problem record to inspect the lighting controller and relay wiring with facilities.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Jet-age gallery lighting zone failures

description: Staff VPN authentication has failed for the membership team on multiple occasions. Opening a problem record to review the VPN concentrator certificate and directory integration.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Staff VPN authentication failures

description: Membership desk receipt printer jams after each paper roll change. Opening a problem record to evaluate whether the roll spec or the printer feed mechanism is at fault.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Membership desk receipt printer jams

description: Volunteer scheduling app has failed to send shift-confirmation emails, causing reassigned docents to arrive in error. Opening a problem record to review the app's email delivery settings.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Volunteer scheduling app email delivery

description: The 360-degree theater projectors lose blended-channel sync partway through each show. Opening a problem record to review the warp/blend processor and genlock timing with the AV vendor.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — 360 theater projector sync loss

description: Recurring entrance digital signage outages persist after earlier remediation. Opening a follow-up problem record to evaluate replacing the aging media player at the front entrance.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Entrance signage media player replacement

description: Motion-platform simulator continues to fault on hydraulic-pressure warnings. Opening a follow-up problem record to schedule a full hydraulic inspection and seal replacement.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Motion-platform simulator hydraulic faults

description: Cockpit exhibit headphone stations repeatedly produce no audio at multiple positions. Opening a problem record to review the audio distribution amp and jack wiring across the exhibit.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Cockpit exhibit headphone audio loss

description: WWII gallery projector continues to flicker with a red color cast. Opening a problem record to confirm bulb life and color-wheel condition before purchasing a replacement lamp.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — WWII gallery projector red cast and flicker

description: Docent portal account lockouts have recurred across several volunteers. Opening a problem record to review the portal's lockout threshold policy and provide a self-service reset option.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Docent portal recurring account lockouts

description: Staff Wi-Fi onboarding for audio guide tablets keeps regressing after firmware updates. Opening a follow-up problem record to standardize the tablet network profile and lock the AP firmware version.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Audio guide tablet Wi-Fi profile standardization
